verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will cherish the day He took my burdens away, And I can say that I was born again; I've seen the Word of the Hour, I felt His glory and power, As He took away my sin and shame.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I was just a little babe that the Father had made, So He fed me and I started to grow; I find it's not so strange when I began to change, And all around they started letting me know.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're lookin' more like your Father, everyday, There's sure a family resemblance, on your face. I can see it in the way you're living, I can hear it in the things you say; You're lookin' more like your Father everyday.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When you're lookin' at me, tell me what do you see? There's an image that I wanna display, Is it the Word of Life, the very nature of Christ? Do you hear Him in the things I say?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He said, "The works that I do will be the same ones in you." So I'm believing that I'm one of His own. As I look in His mirror, it is becoming so clear, That in His likeness I have certainly grown.
